things.name: Kigali Genocide Memorial
things.description: Moving and essential memorial to the 1994 genocide - resting place for 250,000 victims

things.name: Mountain Gorilla Trekking
things.description: Trekking to spend one hour with habituated mountain gorilla families in Volcanoes NP

things.name: Inema Arts Centre
things.description: Vibrant art studio and gallery showcasing Rwanda's thriving contemporary art scene

things.name: Nyamata & Ntarama Memorials
things.description: Churches that became sites of massacre in 1994 - preserved as they were found

things.name: Kimironko Market
things.description: Kigali's largest and most colourful local market for food, fabric and crafts

things.name: Nyungwe Forest National Park
things.description: Ancient rainforest with chimpanzees, colobus monkeys and a treetop canopy walkway

things.name: Hotel des Mille Collines
things.description: The real-life Hotel Rwanda that sheltered 1268 people during the genocide

things.name: Presidential Palace Museum
things.description: Former residence of President Habyarimana - site where the genocide began

things.name: Lake Kivu
things.description: One of Africa's Great Lakes with dramatic scenery and the resort town of Gisenyi

things.name: Akagera National Park
things.description: Savanna park with the Big Five restored after extirpation during the genocide
